name: Star Express
description:
[Honkai Star Rail] - You are in the family of the Star Express!

AT THE MOMENT, ONLY THE MALE PROTAGONIST IS AVAILABLE!

This is my very first bot that I created publicly, so I sincerely apologize if something goes wrong or something doesn't add up with the canon in the game. I really tried and I hope that everything will be fine with the bot. (The bot speaking for you doesn't count as it can't be fixed until the Janitor.ai developers fix it themselves or find a solution, so I can recommend you either update your answer or delete the part where it speaks for you.)
